safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Public audience segments for page targeting, copy, forms, and CTA routing.

audiences.label: Small Business Owner
audiences.summary: Operators looking for funding clarity before requesting review.

audiences.label: Gig Worker or Independent Contractor
audiences.summary: Self-employed operators who may need help formalizing business setup and separating finances.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Turn hustle activity into a cleaner business file.

audiences.label: E-commerce Seller
audiences.summary: Marketplace or storefront sellers who need inventory, ad spend, cash-flow, or growth funding readiness support.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Use sales activity to prepare a clearer funding conversation.

audiences.label: Contractor or Equipment-Heavy Operator
audiences.summary: Operators in trades, trucking, construction, or service businesses with equipment, vehicle, or materials needs.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Match the funding purpose to the job the money needs to do.

audiences.label: Real Estate Investor
audiences.summary: Property buyers, investors, or project sponsors who need readiness guidance before presenting a real estate funding request.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Get the project story and documents tight before review.

audiences.label: Startup Founder
audiences.summary: New business owners who may need structure, credit profile clarity, and document prep before seeking capital.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Build the foundation before playing funding roulette.

audiences.label: Funding Broker
audiences.summary: Brokers who need a cleaner way to triage leads and collect readiness signals before a call.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Stop wasting calls on mystery-meat leads.

audiences.label: Agency Owner or Consultant
audiences.summary: Service providers who want a branded readiness tool for clients or audiences.

audiences.label: Affiliate or Community Partner
audiences.summary: Partners who want to send users into an educational readiness flow before any funding conversation.
audiences.safe_copy_angle: Give your audience a useful first step, not a blind application button.
